text: Last week was a pretty big week for
gaming. On Thursday, Bungie were going
to have their marathon server slam. And
then over the course of the weekend as
well, we were going to see Horizon
Hunters Gathering, having a closed
testing phase of that game. But all I
cared about was what was hitting the
shelves on Friday, which was Resident
Evil 9, aka Resident Evil Recreum,
and it blew the competition out of the
water.
LEON.
